networkPartners.name: Anti Racist Cumbria
networkPartners.desc: Anti Racist Cumbria is a community-led network building collective power across Cumbria.

networkPartners.name: Inclusive North
networkPartners.desc: Inclusive North is a community-led organisation driving change for Global Majority and racially minoritised communities across Lancashire through research, policy innovation and investment.

networkPartners.name: Impact Hub Yorkshire
networkPartners.desc: A collaborative community connecting entrepreneurs, innovators, and organisations driving positive social and environmental change across Yorkshire.

networkPartners.name: The Ubele Initiative
networkPartners.region: Greater London, South East and East of England
networkPartners.tagline: ADVOCATING FOR EQUITY & JUSTICE IN COMMUNITIES.
networkPartners.desc: The Ubele Initiative empowers Global Majority and racially minoritised communities in the UK to act as catalysts for social and economic change.

networkPartners.name: Black South West Network
networkPartners.desc: Black South West Network works across the South West to advance racial justice, amplify Black voices, and build lasting opportunities for equity.

networkPartners.name: South Asian Health Action
networkPartners.desc: South Asian Health Action works to improve health outcomes and reduce inequalities for South Asian communities through research, advocacy, and action.
